heading: Reports on exercise of authority
label: 3072a Reports on exercise of authority
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 409b–1 of this titleSection was enacted as part of the Intelligence Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2004, and not as part of the National Security Act of 1947 which comprises this chapter.

Change of NameCommittee on Government Reform and Oversight of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Government Reform of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Sixth Congress, . Committee on Government Reform of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Oversight and Government Reform of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 6, One Hundred Tenth Congress, . Committee on Oversight and Government Reform of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Oversight and Reform of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 6, One Hundred Sixteenth Congress, . Committee on Oversight and Reform of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Oversight and Accountability of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Eighteenth Congress, .Jan. 6, 1999Jan. 5, 2007Jan. 9, 2019Jan. 9, 2023

children.text: Not later than one year after , and annually thereafter, the Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation shall submit to the appropriate committees of Congress a report on the exercise of the authority in .December 13, 2003section 3072 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: The number of contracts entered into during the period.

children.label: B
children.text: The cost of each such contract.

children.label: C
children.text: The length of each such contract.

children.label: D
children.text: The types of services to be provided under each such contract.

children.label: E
children.text: The availability, if any, of United States Government personnel to perform functions similar to the services to be provided under each such contract.

children.label: F
children.text: The efforts of the Federal Bureau of Investigation to fill available personnel vacancies, or request additional personnel positions, in areas relating to the intelligence or counterintelligence mission of the Bureau.
Each report under this section shall be submitted in unclassified form, but may include a classified annex.

children.label: i
children.text: the Select Committee on Intelligence of the Senate; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Committees on Appropriations, Governmental Affairs, and the Judiciary of the Senate; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the Committees on Appropriations, Government Reform and Oversight, and the Judiciary of the House of Representatives.
